title: Set up future payments
description: Save payment details in a Checkout Session and charge your customers later.

steps.title: Create a new customer
steps.description: Create a new customer for future payments.

nodes.title: Create a new customer
nodes.description: Create a new customer to associate with the payment method you save for later use.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

steps.title: Save the customer payment details
steps.description: Create a checkout session in "setup mode" to collect customer payment details. Ensure that the customer successfully completes the Checkout Session.

nodes.title: Create a checkout interface
nodes.description: Initiate a checkout session to securely save customer payment details for future charges.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Complete checkout process in setup mode
nodes.description: Complete the Checkout Session in setup mode to save the payment method. Click on the link below and fill in the <Link>test card information</Link> with the card number as 4000 0000 0000 0077. Use a valid future date and any three-digit CVC.
nodes.review_prompt: Open the app and confirm the user-facing flow works as described.

nodes.title: Verify that the checkout session is complete
nodes.description: Listen for the <LinkWebhook>webhook event</LinkWebhook> to identify if the Checkout Session was completed successfully.
nodes.review_prompt: Run the relevant Stripe CLI trigger or complete the upstream flow, then confirm the handler receives and verifies the expected event.

steps.title: Charge the payment method later
steps.description: Retrieve the payment method and charge the payment method later.

nodes.title: Retrieve the SetupIntent
nodes.description: Retrieve SetupIntent object to obtain the payment_method ID that can be attached to a customer in next step.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Charge the payment method later
nodes.description: Process a charge on the saved payment method when needed, without requiring the customer to re-enter their payment information.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Confirm that the payment intent succeeded
nodes.description: Verify the successful completion of the PaymentIntent to ensure that the transaction was processed.
nodes.review_prompt: Run the relevant Stripe CLI trigger or complete the upstream flow, then confirm the handler receives and verifies the expected event.
